title: More Discs
description: A mod that adds new music discs and more
body:
![More Discs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36ba02fa03672ef6baaeeab06a927e6730f9d638.png)This mod adds new music discs and other stuff to Minecraft.

## Music discs added
- Catgaming - Disco
- Catgaming - Working On Songs
- Catgaming - Jungle Party
- Catgaming - State Of Mind
- Catgaming - Mediocre
- Markus "Notch" Persson - Mojang Specifications
- C418 - Well*
  
### Also some technical music discs**
- Minecraft Music
- Dragon Music
- Credits Music
- End Music
- Under Water Music
----------------------------
- *the "normal" part of Taswell.
- **these discs refrence to music.creative, music.dragon, etc. and not files, so the music can be random.

## Other stuff added
- A painting made in MS Paint.
- A banner pattern.


![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef5ec0f38a899f9af6f056ad7bead5d7ea2c99f3_0.webp)

Made with MCreator
